title: schedule --cmd bash/sh/python on Windows: auto-resolve interpreter path
desc: wkappbot schedule add --cmd 'bash script.sh' auto-resolves bash to Git bash path on Windows. ResolveShellCommand at registration and execution.
steps: schedule --cmd 'bash script.sh' auto-resolves 'bash' to C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe at registration (NOTE printed) and execution (auto-applied before Spawn)
FindInterpreterPath checks Git bash, usr/bin, WSL, then PATH for bash/sh/python/node
If not found: WARNING printed; execution fails explicitly with clear error in schedule list

requirements.prompt: Fixed: ResolveShellCommand auto-resolves bash at registration and execution --skill schedule-cmd-bash-windows --commit 3911909deab058b31021176af41ff0189accf2e5 --class skill-only

requirements.cmd: wkappbot schedule add 'bash test.sh' --at now --shell 'C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe'
